holdings.infoBox: FAB is an equity ETF with a total of 677 individual holdings. The top holdings are Humana stock at 0.74%, Elevance Health at 0.58%, Super Micro Computer at 0.57%, United Airlines Holdings at 0.55%, and Delta Air Lines at 0.54%.

overview.description: The First Trust Multi Cap Value AlphaDEX Fund (FAB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq AlphaDEX Multi Cap Value index. The fund tracks an index that uses fundamental factors to select and weight value stocks from the Nasdaq US Select Indices. FAB was launched on May 8, 2007 and is issued by First Trust.
